race.comment: STUNG (3) will take some beating first up. She won comfortably on debut at Kilmore, sent into the deep end at start two when tackling the G2 Fillies Classic at Moonee Valley, running a very credible race there when fifth to Salty Pearl. More time to develop now, she draws perfectly and might just be too talented. SIMPLY OUTRAGEOUS (6) resumed with a dominant win in BM56 company at Ballarat, coming away to score by 2.25 lengths. Bit harder now but she can go on with it from a good draw. CHOCOLATE BOX (2) has been third in both runs back from a spell and will take holding out late. BAYWATCH (4) resumes with upside and can figure.
